tasks.title: Fix PtySimulator read_output buffer drain issue
tasks.description: The `read_output()` function in `src/pty.rs:130` breaks after the first successful read instead of continuing to drain the buffer. This causes tests to miss output that arrives in multiple chunks. Root cause is a premature `break` statement at line 130 that prevents the loop from continuing to read until timeout. Fix: Remove the `break` statement to allow the loop to continue reading until timeout.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify read_output() continues reading until timeout by simulating chunked output
AddIntegrationTest: verify all buffered data is captured when output arrives in multiple chunks
AddRegressionTest: ensure existing PTY read tests still pass after the fix
tasks.impl_notes: Remove the `break` statement at line 130 in src/pty.rs. The loop should continue reading until the timeout is reached, allowing all buffered data to be captured.

tasks.title: Add missing similar-asserts dev-dependency
tasks.description: PRD specification requires `similar-asserts = "1.5"` in dev-dependencies but Cargo.toml is missing this entry. Add the missing dependency to enable assertion comparison features in tests.
test_criteria: AddRegressionTest: ensure Cargo.toml has valid dev-dependencies structure
RunTestSuite: verify `cargo check` passes with new dependency

tasks.title: Document DialogTester in PRD
tasks.description: DialogTester module exists in `dialog_tester.rs` but is not documented in the PRD specification. Need to update `spec_v31.md` to include DialogRenderTester module documentation (FR-DIALOG-001).
test_criteria: AddRegressionTest: verify spec_v31.md contains FR-DIALOG-001 section
AddRegressionTest: verify PRD includes DialogRenderTester Public API documentation
tasks.impl_notes: Update spec_v31.md to add FR-DIALOG-001 section documenting DialogRenderTester public API and acceptance criteria.

tasks.title: Remove dead code warnings
tasks.description: Two functions in `dialog_tester.rs` have `#[allow(dead_code)]` decorators but are not used anywhere: `assert_render_result` at line 92 and `assert_empty_state` at line 100. Either remove the functions if not needed, or integrate them into tests.
test_criteria: AddRegressionTest: ensure no #[allow(dead_code)] decorators remain in dialog_tester.rs
AddRegressionTest: ensure all dialog tests still pass after removing or integrating dead functions
RunTestSuite: verify `cargo clippy` produces no dead_code warnings
test_commands: cargo clippy -p ratatui-testing --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings 2>&1 | grep -i 'dead_code' || echo 'No dead_code warnings'
tasks.impl_notes: Either remove `assert_render_result` and `assert_empty_state` functions if unused, or integrate them into tests and remove the `#[allow(dead_code)]` decorators.

tasks.title: Document snapshot.rs in PRD
tasks.description: The `snapshot.rs` module exists and is functional but is not documented in the PRD specification. Need to add FR-SNAP-001 section to PRD documenting the snapshot module API.
test_criteria: AddRegressionTest: verify spec_v31.md contains FR-SNAP-001 section
AddRegressionTest: verify PRD includes snapshot module Public API documentation
tasks.impl_notes: Update spec_v31.md to add FR-SNAP-001 section documenting snapshot module public API and file structure.
